MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

USBDeviceDetect C++

USBDeviceDetect illuminates how to detect the hot-plug state of USB Capture devices.
Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_VC++\CmdTools\USBDeviceDetect

Supported Hardware

USB Gen2/Plus Capture Family

Features

  1. Check the hot-plug status of the USB capture devices.

Walkthrough

  1. To initialize the device, call: MWCaptureInitInstance
  2. To register the callback function, call: MWUSBRegisterHotPlug, MWUSBRegisterHotPlugWithStdCallBack
  3. Inform users by printing a notice once a USB capture device is removed or connected to the system.
  4. To free up system resources and memory after 10s, call: MWUSBUnRegisterHotPlug, MWCloseChannel, MWCaptureExitInstance

Result

USBDeviceDetect
